onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/category.schema.json, set sc_curve to {{sc_curve}}]
Set score curve to {{sc_curve}}. Linear=even growth; Quadratic=moderate scaling (current); Exponential=huge late-tier rewards.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/category.schema.json, set sc_feedback to {{sc_feedback}}]
Set feedback intensity to {{sc_feedback}}. Controls pulse scale, tag duration, and animation drama together.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/category.schema.json, set st_pulse_scale to {{st_pulse_scale}}]
Set score pulse scale to {{st_pulse_scale}}x on merge in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/category.schema.json, set st_tag_duration to {{st_tag_duration}}]
Set floating tag duration to {{st_tag_duration}} seconds.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/category.schema.json, set st_tag_speed to {{st_tag_speed}}]
Set floating tag drift speed to {{st_tag_speed}} px/s.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/scoring/category.schema.json, set st_countup_speed to {{st_countup_speed}}]
Set score count-up smoothing to {{st_countup_speed}} seconds.
